limitations: No quantified AI-specific capex or budget figures found in excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named initiatives and tools without dollar amounts tied specifically to AI.

Risk disclosure covers named categories and regulatory mechanisms but no quantified risk exposure or named governance body, capping score at 4.
